Home/Private Label

Private Label Services

Launch your own brand of cashew kernels or dehydrated food ingredients. We manufacture, pack, and export — you focus on your brand.

Who We Work With

We Serve Brands Worldwide

From startup food brands to established supermarket chains, we partner with businesses of all sizes.

🛒

Retail Brands

🏪

🍽️

Flexible Models

Supply Options

01

Own Brand Packaging

We manufacture and pack under your brand name, logo, and packaging design. Minimum quantities are flexible.

02

White Label (Ready to Brand)

Pre-packed, unbranded product ready for your labels — fastest time-to-market option.

03

Co-Packing

Supply us your packaging material and we fill, seal, and pack to your specification.

04

Custom Formulation

Blended seasoning mixes, custom granulation sizes, or specific moisture specs built to your brief.

Why Partner With Us

Everything You Need to Launch

We handle manufacturing, testing, packing, and export — leaving you free to focus on building your brand and growing your customer base.

  • Low minimum order quantities — ideal for new product launches
  • Custom pack sizes: retail pouches, jars, bulk bags, or tins
  • Full nutritional labelling support for EU, US, and GCC markets
  • Barcode generation and compliance label design on request
  • Confidential NDA available for product formulations
  • On-time delivery with pre-shipment QC and documentation

Packaging Design Support

We can connect you with packaging designers who understand food labelling regulations for your target market.

Sample Before You Commit

Pre-production samples are standard. You approve quality before bulk manufacture begins.

Fast Turnaround

Typical lead time of 15–25 days from approved sample to shipment dispatch.

Dedicated Account Manager

One point of contact who knows your brand, your specs, and your delivery schedule.

How It Works

01

Inquiry

Share your product, quantity, pack size, and branding requirements.

02

Quotation

We send a detailed quote within 24–48 hours including lead time and MOQ.

03

Sample

A pre-production sample is produced for your approval before bulk manufacture.

04

Production

Bulk production begins upon sample approval and order confirmation.

05

QC & Pack

Final product is tested, packed under your brand, and documented for export.

06

Dispatch

Shipment sent with full documentation. Tracking provided throughout.

Start Your Private Label Journey

Let's Build Your Brand Together

Share your product concept and we'll handle everything from manufacturing to export-ready packaging. Get a quote in 24 hours.

Start Your Inquiry
Shritik Enterprises
LLP

India-based manufacturer and exporter of premium cashew kernels, dehydrated onion, garlic, and ginger. Serving worldwide export markets with certified, quality-focused food ingredients.
